name: barzakh_scan
description: Scan a firmware image or memory dump for UEFI bootkits. Returns JSON findings with severity levels (critical/high/medium/low) and detection details.

target.description: Path to firmware image or memory dump file to scan

scan_types.description: Comma-separated list of specific detector types to run (e.g. 'uefi,spi,smm'). Omit to run all detectors.
